title: Verify memory nudge feature end-to-end
description: The memory nudge feature already exists in src/memory/nudge.ts of the Kody Engine. It analyzes task artifacts after successful completion and writes patterns to graph memory when KODY_MEMORY_NUDGE=true. This task is to verify the feature works end-to-end by running a task with the feature enabled and confirming ep_nudge_*.json episode files are created in .kody/graph/episodes/ and new nodes appear in nodes.json.
existing_patterns: src/memory/nudge.ts - LLM-driven pattern extraction after task completion
.kody/graph/episodes/ep_migration_001.json - Episode file structure with source, runId, taskId, createdAt fields
.kody/graph/sessions-index.json - FTS index with document entries including ep_nudge_* references
